mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.order_number AS orderNumber, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.customer_phone AS customerPhone, o.customer_email AS customerEmail, o.payment_status AS paymentStatus, o.status AS orderStatus FROM orders o WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber}

SELECT oi.id AS orderItemId, p.code AS productCode, pov.code AS optionId, pov.value AS classify, po.code AS optionTypeCode, po.name AS optionType, oi.quantity AS quantity, oi.unit_price AS price
FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN order_item_options oio ON oio.order_item_id = oi.id JOIN product_option_values pov ON pov.id = oio.option_value_id JOIN product_options po ON po.id = pov.option_id
WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} AND oi.partner_id = 'b49be80d-4150-408b-80e6-e11c6f13db9d'
ORDER BY oi.created_at ASC
SELECT ticket_number FROM order_tickets WHERE order_item_id = #{orderItemId} AND partner_order_code IS NULL AND (ticket_used IS NULL OR ticket_used = false) ORDER BY created_at
SELECT ot.ticket_number FROM order_tickets ot JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = ot.order_item_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY ot.created_at

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.order_number AS orderNumber, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.customer_phone AS customerPhone, o.customer_email AS customerEmail, o.status AS orderStatus FROM orders o WHERE o.id = #{orderId}
